tasks.goal:
Use this repository to build an application that helps a researcher compare the latest work on a narrowly defined Agentic RL question and produce a source-backed research map.

Research the current workflow, build the smallest useful vertical slice, and prove it end to end. Continue until complete or legitimately blocked.

Use this repository to build an application that helps a small nonprofit onboard a volunteer from application through document review and confirmed completion.

Research the current workflow, build the smallest useful vertical slice, and prove it end to end. Continue until complete or legitimately blocked.

Use this repository to build an application that helps a founder turn a product brief and metrics file into a reviewable launch presentation.

Research the current workflow, build the smallest useful vertical slice, and prove it end to end. Continue until complete or legitimately blocked.
